message:
fix: resolve 2 pre-existing test failures

1. ambient.rs: Update stale KNOWN_FINDINGS line reference for
   blocking_pool.rs thread spawn (589 → 622).

2. state.rs: Reject finalizer registration once region begins closing
   (Closing/Draining/Finalizing), not just when fully Closed. The
   is_terminal() check only caught Closed state; now also checks
   is_closing() to match the test's expectation and prevent late
   finalizer registration during shutdown.

Test suite: 6039 passed, 0 failed (was 6037 passed, 2 failed).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -116,7 +116,7 @@ pub const KNOWN_FINDINGS: &[AmbientFinding] = &[
     },
     AmbientFinding {
         file: "runtime/blocking_pool.rs",
-        line: 589,
+        line: 622,
         category: AmbientCategory::Spawn,
         severity: Severity::Info,
         description: "Worker thread spawning in blocking pool",
